reviews.review_description: i thought this was a free roam forest survival game, turns out its a short intro and not free roam never buying these games ever again 1 STAR

reviews.review_title: Threw logs at Ali Wong - they planned fo
reviews.review_description: they planned for it...  impressed that they handled me trying to break it.  she gets increasingly mad and eventually ignores me and shuts off.  instead of just cycling the same reaction.  I appreciate this attention to detail ... also i chose pork bun over humanity.  pretty good that they got me to care about him/her that much.
Absolute rubbish. Won't buy anything from Baobab Studios, Inc.

This was going great, I couldn't wait to see what would happen next in the game after making my 'choice', then the credits stated and it was over. The whole thing only lasted about 10 minutes and felt like the intro to the game. On the plus side, the graphics were great, the story line was fantastic and it was funny and interactive. I just wish it had gone on to be more.

reviews.review_title: Short but fun. Great for kids.
reviews.review_description: My wife and I both enjoyed this game very much. It is very simple and short enough to hold the attention span of a child or an individual with cognitive disabilities.👍👍👍
Good game but it’s short
I found myself laughing again and again! Great job!

reviews.review_title: The experience is fun but very short
reviews.review_description: The game itself is fun. But the playtime is about 5-10 minutes. It is not worth its price. Despite this, the character are charming and fun.

I love this game the story was great the was multiple choices. depended on what you did slightly altered what would happen next but it was way too short,I completed it very quickly￼ and then completed it again but try different things to see what would happen so overall I would recommend getting this game

reviews.review_title: Great game to play every night
reviews.review_description: Each night I play this and sometimes I dream about the different possibilitys in it too bad it ain't like that in the game.
I was very suprised when this “game” ended after about 15 minutes.  Super polished and charming but far too expensive for the content provided.
Great for all ages and playing abilities, good length to just have a break in your day, animation is excellent.
My kids love this app.

5 stars because it deserves it and I knew how long of an experience I was in for. I use Bonfire to show of the Quest to friends and family. After I scare them with Richie’s Plank Experience, I completely change the environment and send them through space to a fireside hangout. It’s immersive, it’s fun and it’s the perfect length of time for someone new to wearing the headset. And you should be thanking your lucky stars the credits are substantial as you dance with your laser hands and the Polka bangs hard. Also love the ship. Would be sweet to watch a making of video in there. Great game (it’s a game. I experienced myself playing the game) thanks!
Really? Is it a joke?!
Not worth it. The entire short film was like 5 mins long, and cost 5$. Idk what I was expecting but bought it for my daughter and I was just displeased

I have been looking for this game after I bought a VR headset. I love this game when I played around it in Siggraph 2019. I hope there is a infinite version that people can sitting around the bonfire, listening to radio and baking marshmallows.

This is a very well made VR experience, but it’s extremely short (+-20 min). Boabab studios also made Crow which I found to be a better experience, you can see that for free in the Oculus video app.  4.99 would have been a fair price.
Ok I get it's VR so it will cost more but for a 10 to 20 minute game really. At most make it $3.
Very cleverly done and the scenery is beautiful. I laughed throughout it. Wish it was longer and hope to see more like it.
